reasoning: At 4x the pink diamond-eye gem reads clearly and has genuine personality — the central eye motif is endearing and the magenta/yellow palette is energetic. Contrast holds on both dark and light backgrounds. However: (1) At 1x the sprite shrinks to an ambiguous smudge; the gem silhouette is barely a diamond and the base is indistinguishable, eliminating all charm at play resolution. (2) The pedestal/creature base is a muddy grey blob cluster — mushy silhouette, no readable personality, fails the sticker test on its own. (3) The diamond body uses sharp pointed vertices that read slightly aggressive/edgy rather than the round/soft friendly-toy ideal. The eye saves it from feeling charmless but the overall design is more 'cool mysterious crystal' than 'cute toy charm'. Passes contrast, fails on 1x charm and base clarity.
